name: ComponentIndex
summary: Represents an index of an element contained in another object.

constructors.name: ComponentIndex
constructors.summary: Construct component index with a specific type/index combination

methods.name: CompareTo
methods.summary: Compares this ComponentIndex with another ComponentIndex.

params.name: other
params.doc: The other ComponentIndex to use in comparison

returns.doc: 0: if this is identical to other-1: if this.ComponentIndexType < other.ComponentIndexType-1: if this.ComponentIndexType == other.ComponentIndexType and this.Index < other.Index+1: otherwise.

methods.name: Equals(ComponentIndex)
methods.summary: Determines whether the specified ComponentIndex is equal to the current ComponentIndex, comparing by value.

params.name: other
params.doc: The other ComponentIndex to compare with.

returns.doc: true if other has the same ComponentIndexType and Index as this; otherwise, false.

methods.name: Equals(Object)
methods.summary: Determines whether the specified Object is equal to the current ComponentIndex, comparing by value.

params.name: obj
params.doc: The other object to compare with.

returns.doc: true if obj is a ComponentIndex and ComponentIndexType and Index is the same; false otherwise.

methods.name: GetHashCode
methods.summary: Computes the hash code for this ComponentIndex object.

returns.doc: A hash value that might be equal for two different ComponentIndex values.

methods.name: IsUnset
methods.summary: Return true is this component index is the same as the Unset component index

methods.name: Equality
methods.signature: public static bool operator ==(ComponentIndex a, ComponentIndex b)
methods.summary: Determines whether two ComponentIndexes have equal values.

returns.doc: True if the ComponentIndexes are equal

methods.name: GreaterThan
methods.signature: public static bool operator >(ComponentIndex a, ComponentIndex b)
methods.summary: Determines whether the first ComponentIndex comes after the second.

returns.doc: true if the first comes after the second; otherwise, false.

methods.name: GreaterThanOrEqual
methods.signature: public static bool operator >=(ComponentIndex a, ComponentIndex b)
methods.summary: Determines whether the first ComponentIndex comes after the second, or it is equal to it.

returns.doc: true if the first is equal to the second or comes after it; otherwise, false

methods.name: Inequality
methods.signature: public static bool operator !=(ComponentIndex a, ComponentIndex b)
methods.summary: Determines whether two ComponentIndexes have different values.

returns.doc: True if the ComponentIndexes are unequal

methods.name: LessThan
methods.signature: public static bool operator <(ComponentIndex a, ComponentIndex b)
methods.summary: Determines whether the first ComponentIndex comes before the second.

returns.doc: true if the first comes before the second; otherwise, false.

methods.name: LessThanOrEqual
methods.signature: public static bool operator <=(ComponentIndex a, ComponentIndex b)
methods.summary: Determines whether the first ComponentIndex comes before the second, or it is equal to it.

returns.doc: true if the first is equal to the second or comes before it; otherwise, false

properties.name: ComponentIndexType
properties.summary: The interpretation of Index depends on the Type value. Type m_index interpretation (0 based indices) no_type used when context makes it clear what array is being index brep_vertex Brep.m_V[] array index brep_edge Brep.m_E[] array index brep_face Brep.m_F[] array index brep_trim Brep.m_T[] array index brep_loop Brep.m_L[] array index mesh_vertex Mesh.m_V[] array index meshtop_vertex MeshTopology.m_topv[] array index meshtop_edge MeshTopology.m_tope[] array index mesh_face Mesh.m_F[] array index idef_part InstanceDefinition.m_object_uuid[] array index polycurve_segment PolyCurve::m_segment[] array index dim_linear_point LinearDimension2::POINT_INDEX dim_radial_point RadialDimension2::POINT_INDEX dim_angular_point AngularDimension2::POINT_INDEX dim_ordinate_point OrdinateDimension2::POINT_INDEX dim_text_point TextEntity2 origin point.

properties.name: Index
properties.summary: The interpretation of m_index depends on the m_type value. m_type m_index interpretation (0 based indices) no_type used when context makes it clear what array is being index brep_vertex Brep.m_V[] array index brep_edge Brep.m_E[] array index brep_face Brep.m_F[] array index brep_trim Brep.m_T[] array index brep_loop Brep.m_L[] array index mesh_vertex Mesh.m_V[] array index meshtop_vertex MeshTopology.m_topv[] array index meshtop_edge MeshTopology.m_tope[] array index mesh_face Mesh.m_F[] array index idef_part InstanceDefinition.m_object_uuid[] array index polycurve_segment PolyCurve::m_segment[] array index dim_linear_point LinearDimension2::POINT_INDEX dim_radial_point RadialDimension2::POINT_INDEX dim_angular_point AngularDimension2::POINT_INDEX dim_ordinate_point OrdinateDimension2::POINT_INDEX dim_text_point TextEntity2 origin point.

properties.name: IsSet
properties.summary: True if is set to a value between and .

properties.name: Unset
properties.summary: The unset value of component index.
